messages.message: 'query' is never reassigned. Use 'const' instead.
'transfersOutQuery' is never reassigned. Use 'const' instead.

fix.text:
const transfersOutQuery = supabase
                .from('purchases')
                .select('quantity, date, products(sku), branches:branch_id(name)')
                .eq('source_branch_id', activeBranchId)
                .eq('status', 'received')
                .gt('date', afterStr);

messages.message: 'dTransfersOutQuery' is never reassigned. Use 'const' instead.

fix.text:
const dTransfersOutQuery = supabase
                .from('purchases')
                .select('quantity, products(sku), branches:branch_id(name)')
                .eq('source_branch_id', activeBranchId)
                .eq('status', 'received')
                .gte('date', isoTargetStart)
                .lte('date', isoTargetEnd);
